src/main/java/com/psiquelaboral/psique/a.general_idea: Consolidate multiple Lombok imports into a single wildcard import.
Add a new 'id' field to the AuthResponse model.
Normalize indentation from tabs to spaces.
Refactored individual Spring Web annotations into a wildcard import for brevity.
Added CrossOrigin annotation to enable CORS support for the authentication controller.
Injected AuthenticationManager to handle explicit authentication logic.
Added explicit authentication call using BCrypt via AuthenticationManager in the login flow.
Included user ID in the authentication response payload.
Removed unused signup endpoint stub.
Migrate Spring Security configuration from deprecated method-chaining API to the new lambda-based DSL required in Spring Security 6+.
src/main/java/com/psiquelaboral/psique/a.why_exists: The method-chaining API (e.g., .csrf().disable(), .authorizeHttpRequests() without lambda) is removed in Spring Security 6, causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/com/psiquelaboral/psique/a.general_idea: Add import for AbstractHttpConfigurer to support the new lambda-based CSRF configuration.
